prompt: Tap flop middle to anchor blocker in depth context.
why_v1: Board anchor keeps street context stable before stack-depth action.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_mid is the board anchor because the blocker only matters after the flop texture shows whether it has real support.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The middle flop card is the right anchor here because the full flop picture has to be set before you judge whether the blocker has enough board support.
